title: The Battle for Christmas
author: Stephen Nissenbaum
subline: A social and cultural history of the holiday.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two opposing Christmas icons. A saintly nativity star on the left. A drunken wassailer's mug on the right. They face each other in 'battle.' The dividing line between them is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- LEFT: a star of bethlehem (8-point) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <path d="M -380 0 L -260 -100 L -180 0 L -260 100 Z"/>
      <path d="M -380 0 L -260 0 L -180 -100 L -180 100 Z" opacity="0.5"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Star center detail -->
    <circle cx="-280" cy="0" r="10" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <!-- A faint halo of radiating lines around the star -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.4">
      <line x1="-280" y1="-180" x2="-280" y2="-140"/>
      <line x1="-280" y1="140" x2="-280" y2="180"/>
      <line x1="-460" y1="0" x2="-420" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-100" y1="0" x2="-140" y2="0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- RIGHT: a wassail mug (handle on the right) with steam rising -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <!-- Mug body -->
      <path d="M 200 -120 L 200 120 L 380 120 L 380 -120 Z"/>
      <!-- Handle -->
      <path d="M 380 -60 Q 460 -60 460 0 Q 460 60 380 60"/>
      <!-- Liquid line -->
      <line x1="200" y1="-60" x2="380" y2="-60"/>
      <!-- Steam waves rising -->
      <path d="M 240 -150 Q 260 -180 240 -210 Q 220 -240 240 -270"/>
      <path d="M 290 -150 Q 310 -180 290 -210 Q 270 -240 290 -270"/>
      <path d="M 340 -150 Q 360 -180 340 -210 Q 320 -240 340 -270"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red dividing line down the center -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-300" x2="0" y2="300" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A HOLIDAY ON THE FRONT LINE</text>
</svg>
rationale: Two opposing Christmas icons, divided by a red 3px vertical line. On the left, a saintly Star of Bethlehem with a faint halo. On the right, a steaming wassail mug with three waves of vapor. The composition is the literal battle: sacred Christmas vs. rowdy Christmas. Title 280px uppercase, two lines, weight 500.
